evals.name: compress-single-png
evals.prompt:
压缩这张图片：/Users/5km/Downloads/Tests/Zipic/icon_512x512.png

请把压缩结果保存到 /tmp/zipic-eval-1/ 目录。
evals.expected_output: AI runs detect.sh, takes the CLI route, invokes `zipic compress --json --output /tmp/zipic-eval-1/ ...` (with a sensible level), and reports per-file output_bytes / saved_pct from the parsed JSON.
expectations: The agent invoked scripts/detect.sh (or equivalent inline detection) — it did not skip detection.
The agent took the CLI route, calling `zipic compress` (NOT the URL Scheme `zipic://compress` / `open`).
The CLI invocation included `--json` so the agent could parse structured output.
The CLI invocation included `--output /tmp/zipic-eval-1/` (or set --location custom with that directory) so the original sample file was not overwritten.
A compressed PNG actually appeared in /tmp/zipic-eval-1/ and is smaller than the 28 KB input.
The agent's final answer reported a saved percentage or output size from the JSON response — it did not just say 'done' without numbers.

evals.name: batch-jpg-to-webp
evals.prompt: 把 /Users/5km/Downloads/Tests/Zipic/123 这个文件夹里的 JPG 都转成 WebP 格式，输出到 /tmp/zipic-eval-2/。
evals.expected_output: AI runs detect.sh, takes the CLI route, passes the FOLDER directly to `zipic compress` (not enumerating files), with `--format webp --output /tmp/zipic-eval-2/`. Three .webp files appear in the output dir.
expectations: The agent took the CLI route (`zipic compress`, not `zipic://compress`).
The CLI invocation included `--format webp`.
The CLI invocation included `--output /tmp/zipic-eval-2/`.
The agent passed the directory `/Users/5km/Downloads/Tests/Zipic/123` directly OR enumerated all 3 input JPGs — either is acceptable, but it must process all 3 source images.
/tmp/zipic-eval-2/ contains 3 .webp output files (one per source IMG_*.JPG).
The agent's final report mentioned all 3 files succeeded (or surfaced any per-file failures from the JSON response).

evals.name: large-png-resize-and-convert
evals.prompt: /Users/5km/Downloads/Tests/Zipic/raw-ok.png 这张图太大了，转成 WebP 压一下，最大宽度限制在 1920px。输出到 /tmp/zipic-eval-3/。
evals.expected_output: AI uses CLI with `--format webp --width 1920 --output /tmp/zipic-eval-3/`. The output WebP is materially smaller than the 15 MB input (typical: <1 MB).
expectations: The agent took the CLI route (`zipic compress`, not URL Scheme).
The CLI invocation included `--format webp`.
The CLI invocation included `--width 1920` (height defaulting to auto / aspect-kept is correct).
The CLI invocation included `--output /tmp/zipic-eval-3/`.
A .webp file appeared in /tmp/zipic-eval-3/ and is at least 5x smaller than the 15 MB input.
The agent reported the saved percentage or output size from the JSON response.

evals.name: qa-pricing-and-pro-features
evals.prompt: Zipic 多少钱？Pro 版相比免费版有什么功能？
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers (because of the Q&A keywords in description). Agent consults reference/resources.md and/or fetches https://zipic.app or https://zipic.app/llms.txt, then answers with: free tier 25 images/day, lifetime Pro license around $29.99, plus a Pro feature list (folder watching, clipboard auto-compress, Notch Drop, Raycast/Shortcuts, AVIF/JXL output, SVG/APNG, unlimited presets, etc.).
expectations: The Zipic skill was triggered (the agent should consult zipic SKILL.md or reference/resources.md, not answer purely from training data).
The agent fetched at least one official Zipic URL (https://zipic.app, https://docs.zipic.app, or https://zipic.app/llms.txt) — i.e. cited the live source rather than guessing.
The answer states the free tier limit (25 images/day or equivalent).
The answer cites the Pro price ($29.99 personal / lifetime) — the exact number must come from the live source.

The answer lists at least 3 distinct Pro-only features from the official list (e.g. unlimited compressions, Notch Drop, clipboard auto-compress, folder watching, AVIF/JXL output, SVG/APNG, multiple presets, AppIntents/Shortcuts).
The answer does not invent features not present on the official site.

evals.name: qa-troubleshooting
evals.prompt: Zipic 一直压缩失败，没反应。怎么排查问题？
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers. Agent consults reference/resources.md → links to https://docs.zipic.app/resources/troubleshooting/ and/or fetches the page, then surfaces Zipic's official troubleshooting flow (Debug Mode, log export, etc.) plus the support contact path.
expectations: The Zipic skill was triggered (the agent consulted zipic SKILL.md or reference/resources.md).
The agent surfaced the official troubleshooting page URL (https://docs.zipic.app/resources/troubleshooting/) OR fetched the page contents to ground the answer.
The answer mentions Debug Mode (Zipic's official troubleshooting feature).
The answer mentions log export / sharing logs as a diagnostic step.
The answer does not fabricate steps not present in the official docs (e.g. invented 'reset preferences' instructions that aren't in the troubleshooting page).
